name: Org Literate Lab

records.outline: Literate Org can explain the frontend boundary
records.title: Literate Org can explain the frontend boundary

records.outline: Literate Org can explain the frontend boundary / Decision table
records.title: Decision table
records.bodyPreview:
| Layer       | Owns                         | Must not own                  |
|-------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------|
| Rust/WASM   | native Org parse projections | browser layout                |
| TypeScript  | interac

records.title: Rspack belongs in package.json
records.bodyPreview:
The local frontend now uses Rspack scripts from =package.json=.  Nix or direnv
may provide the shell, but the browser demo should clearly own its bundler
contract.


#+BEGIN_EXAMPLE
npm run dev -- --port 5173
npm run build
#+END_EXAMPLE

records.title: Source block overflow contract
records.bodyPreview:
Long code blocks need horizontal scrolling, readable font sizing, and no layout
shift when toggling Zen mode.

records.outline: Records / Capture Babel result rendering policy
records.title: Capture Babel result rendering policy
records.bodyPreview:
The demo includes source blocks, but executing them is out of scope for this
browser surface.

records.outline: Agenda / Verify code block rendering in Blog view
records.title: Verify code block rendering in Blog view
records.bodyPreview: The selected article should keep code indentation and avoid visual overflow.

records.outline: Agenda / Add syntax-specific visual regression notes
records.title: Add syntax-specific visual regression notes
records.bodyPreview:
Tables, source blocks, quotes, drawers, and links deserve explicit screenshot
checks.

html:
Literate Org can explain the frontend boundary

This file represents the technical writing shape: prose around code, tables, receipts, and action items. 

type ParserBoundary = {
  nativeSyntax: "org";
  projection: "viewIndex" | "agendaView" | "capturePlan";
  host: "browser";
};

const boundary: ParserBoundary = {
  nativeSyntax: "org",
  projection: "agendaView",
  host: "browser",
};

console.log(boundary);

Decision table

LayerOwnsMust not own
Rust/WASMnative Org parse projectionsbrowser layout
TypeScriptinteraction and renderingad hoc Org syntax parsing
Rspackdev watch and bundle outputproduct-facing status widgets
Org sourcewriting and planning truthgenerated frontend state

Rspack belongs in package.json

The local frontend now uses Rspack scripts from package.json. Nix or direnv may provide the shell, but the browser demo should clearly own its bundler contract. 

npm run dev -- --port 5173
npm run build

Records

Source block overflow contract

Long code blocks need horizontal scrolling, readable font sizing, and no layout shift when toggling Zen mode.

Capture Babel result rendering policy

The demo includes source blocks, but executing them is out of scope for this browser surface.

Agenda

Verify code block rendering in Blog view

The selected article should keep code indentation and avoid visual overflow.

Add syntax-specific visual regression notes

Tables, source blocks, quotes, drawers, and links deserve explicit screenshot checks.
